positive: A whimsical forest scene illustration featuring a group of friendly woodland animals (fox, deer, owl) surrounded by bioluminescent mushrooms and glowing ferns. Watercolor style, soft pastel color palette, storybook aesthetic, highly detailed, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photorealism, oversaturated, messy composition
